reviews.comment:
En mi caso,  alquilo una cochera para dejar el auto cuando estoy varios días en Mar del Plata, centrica, frente a un supermercado que a una mujer le facilita el 100 % las cosas. Muy recomendable. AHHH la rampa de acceso es muy cómoda y mi auto que es grande no le pasa finito a nada ......

(Translated by Google)
In my case, I rent a garage to leave my car when I'm in Mar del Plata for several days. It's centrally located, across from a supermarket, which makes things 100% easier for a woman. Highly recommended. AHHHH, the access ramp is very convenient, and my large car doesn't even roll over anything...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBaVlmQ0R3EAE
